events.text: Jordy Alcívar (Ecuador) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Leandro Bacuna (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Ecuador. Kevin Rodríguez replaces Jordy Alcívar.
Juninho Bacuna (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Livano Comenencia (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Ecuador. Nilson Angulo replaces Pervis Estupiñán.
Juriën Gaari (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Curaçao. Kenji Gorré replaces Juninho Bacuna.
Substitution, Curaçao. Roshon van Eijma replaces Deveron Fonville.
Substitution, Curaçao. Jearl Margaritha replaces Tahith Chong.
Substitution, Ecuador. Ángelo Preciado replaces Alan Franco.
Substitution, Curaçao. Gervane Kastaneer replaces Jürgen Locadia because of an injury.
Substitution, Curaçao. Godfried Roemeratoe replaces Livano Comenencia.
Substitution, Ecuador. Jordy Caicedo replaces John Yeboah.
Gervane Kastaneer (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
